qa.summary: All 6 OBJ blockers from iter-1 QA report are resolved in BA iter-2. AC count grew from 8 to 9 (added AC-08 fail-closed + AC-05b discriminating negative matrix). 9 codex iter-2 findings (C1, C3, C5, C6, C7, C8, C9, C10, C11) are explicitly cited and applied across ticket, context, and acceptance-criteria artifacts. Tokenizer prescription shlex.shlex(posix=True, punctuation_chars=True) appears consistently in all 3 locations (ticket: 8 occurrences, context: 6, AC: 6). Internal contradictions from iter-1 (OBJ-6) are resolved — every occurrence now consistently uses shlex.shlex with punctuation_chars=True and rejects plain shlex.split.

evidence_quality.notes: All 3 original BA bug claims still reproduce; iter-2 added AC-08 fail-closed coverage backed by codex iter-2 C11 (list(lex) exhaustion).

scope_alignment.notes: All 6 user-listed items remain covered; AC matrices now match the technical-hint scope ('*?[]' for M4, all quoted metachars for AC-04, unspaced separators for AC-07).

investigation_completeness.notes: Iter-1 investigation complete; iter-2 layered codex C1/C3/C5/C6/C7/C8/C9/C10/C11 with explicit disposition='applied' in context codex_review_findings.

affected_file_accuracy.notes: Files unchanged from iter-1: commands/dev.md Step 5 (item 1), hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh L662/L683/L749 (items 3-5), spec-20260518-225715.md (item 6).

spec_text_vs_execution_drift.notes: Iter-1 drifts resolved: AC-01 now has 4-condition matrix; AC-04 covers 6 quoted metachars + 4 active negative cases; AC-05 covers all 4 glob forms with AC-05b discriminating negative; AC-07 covers 4 unspaced separator forms; AC-08 NEW enforces fail-closed. All shlex.shlex prescriptions consistent across artifacts (no more shlex.split contradiction).

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: AC-01 fixtures: a_absent, b_null, c_empty, d_different — all yield expected_post_patch_spec_path. PLUS e_negative_resolved_null where orchestrator_spec_path=null → expected_post_patch_spec_path_absent_or_null=true (codex iter-2 C3 wording: 'orchestrator-resolved spec_path == null' covers both --spec-not-passed and auto-detect-returned-null subcases).

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter1_complaint: AC-07 must include unspaced separator cases (>=3)
iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: AC-07 fixtures contain 4 unspaced separator cases: a_unspaced_semi (;), b_unspaced_andand (&&), c_unspaced_oror (|| — codex iter-2 C5), d_unspaced_pipe (|). All rc=2 with stderr 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write'.

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter1_complaint: AC-04 must include quoted metachar matrix (>=5 metachars: |, ;, &&, $(), >)
iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: AC-04 allow_fixtures contains 6 quoted metachar cases: a_quoted_pipe (|), b_quoted_semicolon (;), c_quoted_andand (&&), d_quoted_cmdsub ($()), e_quoted_redirect (>), f_quoted_procsub (<()). PLUS 4 deny_fixtures discriminating quoted-ALLOW from active-DENY: g_active_cmdsub_unquoted, h_active_cmdsub_doublequoted (codex iter-2 C6: double-quotes do NOT inhibit $()), i_active_procsub_read, j_active_procsub_write (codex iter-2 C8).

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter1_complaint: NEW fail-closed AC required for malformed shlex input
iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: AC-08 is NEW (ac_uid: ac08_fail_closed_v2). Fixtures: a_unterminated_single_quote, b_unterminated_double_quote — both rc=2. Implementation hint mandates try/except ValueError: deny() around list(lex) exhaustion (codex iter-2 C11: construction alone does not raise; list(lex) consumes the lexer and surfaces ValueError).

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter1_complaint: AC-05 glob char must be extended to *, ?, [abc], [!abc]
iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: AC-05 fixtures contain all 4 glob forms: a_star, b_question, c_bracket_positive, d_bracket_negation. PLUS AC-05b (NEW discriminating negative matrix) appends ;rm to each of the 4 glob forms — all rc=2 (entry gate matches AND compound detected). note_for_dev addresses iter-2 C10: bracket chars are glob syntax not regex char classes; regex impl must escape [, ], !, *, ?.

iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter1_complaint: shlex.shlex(posix=True, punctuation_chars=True) must be prescribed in 3+ locations consistently; no remaining 'shlex.split' mentions as the chosen strategy
iter1_objections_resolution_audit.iter2_evidence: ticket-20260526-053746.md: 8 occurrences (Dev constraint, M3 milestone, Reference Source recipe, AC-08 hint, Items 3+4 affected location, C1 row, F3 row, rationale). context-20260526-053746.json: 6 occurrences (stack constraint at line 38, root cause rationale, strategy, justification, F3 row, C1 row). acceptance-criteria-20260526-053746.json: 6 occurrences (AC-03/AC-04/AC-07/AC-08 given|when + AC-08 hint). All consistently specify posix=True, punctuation_chars=True with attribute assignment for commenters='' and whitespace_split=True (codex iter-2 C1: kwarg form is invalid Python). Plain shlex.split is explicitly forbidden at every mention.

ac_count_audit.delta_note: +1 (AC-08 fail-closed added). AC-05b is a sibling AC under AC-05 family (counted as separate entry in file).

codex_iter2_findings_audit.note: 9 codex findings explicitly cited with disposition='applied' in context JSON codex_review_findings and rationale references across all 3 artifacts.

iter1_gaps_now_closed: AC-01: 4-condition matrix added (a_absent, b_null, c_empty, d_different) + e_negative_resolved_null
AC-04: quoted-metachar matrix expanded to 6 metachars + 4 active-form negative cases
AC-05: extended to *, ?, [abc], [!abc]; AC-05b discriminating negative matrix added
AC-07: unspaced-separator cases added (4 of them: ;, &&, ||, |)
AC-08: fail-closed AC added (NEW) — covers OBJ-4

empirical_verifications_performed.test: F3 plain shlex.split on unspaced separator

empirical_verifications_performed.result: Only Cycle 1, 2, 3 headers present; 4/5/6 missing as BA claims

out_of_scope_observations.observation: Root cause for item 1 is BA agent's output schema lacking spec_path field. User explicitly framed the fix as 'orchestrator post-BA patch in commands/dev.md', so the orchestrator-side fix matches user requirement (requirement wins). However, a future cycle should add spec_path to agents/ba.md output schema so BA emits it natively, removing the need for orchestrator post-hoc repair.

self_verification.notes: All 6 OBJ resolutions backed by direct file:line evidence in iter-2 artifacts. Tokenizer prescription consistency verified via grep -c across all 3 files. AC count verified by reading acceptance-criteria JSON (9 entries: AC-01, AC-02, AC-03, AC-04, AC-05, AC-05b, AC-06, AC-07, AC-08).
